Bash(git commit -m 'Gemini無料枠の分析スキップを修復: モデルを2.0-flash-liteに戻し日次枠超過を即スキップ *)

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(50\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { $runs = gh run list --workflow=monitor.yml --limit 3 --json status,createdAt,event,conclusion | ConvertFrom-Json; $today = $runs | Where-Object { $_.createdAt -gt '2026-06-10T22:00:00Z' }; if \($today\) { Write-Output "RUN DETECTED:"; $today | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.createdAt\) event=$\($_.event\) status=$\($_.status\) conclusion=$\($_.conclusion\)" }; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 180 }; if \(-not $today\) { Write-Output "NO RUN by $\(Get-Date\)" })

PowerShell(git show origin/master:docs/reports/report_daily_2026-06-10.html | Select-String -Pattern "スキップ|分析|gemini|quota|上限" | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(150, $_.Line.Trim\(\).Length\)\) })

PowerShell(git log -1 --format="%cI %s" dccd733; Write-Output "---"; foreach \($d in @\("2026-06-04","2026-06-05","2026-06-07","2026-06-10"\)\) { $f = "docs/reports/report_daily_$d.html"; $c = git show "origin/master:$f" 2>$null; if \($c\) { $skip = \([regex]::Matches\($c, "API無料枠の上限により分析をスキップしました"\)\).Count; $err = \([regex]::Matches\($c, "分析中にエラーが発生しました"\)\).Count; Write-Output "$d : skip=$skip error=$err" } else { Write-Output "$d : no report" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($d in @\("2026-06-04","2026-06-05","2026-06-07","2026-06-10"\)\) { $f = "docs/reports/report_daily_$d.html"; $c = git show "origin/master:$f" 2>$null; if \($c\) { $summaries = \([regex]::Matches\($c, 'summary-text'\)\).Count; $skip = \([regex]::Matches\($c, "API無料枠の上限により分析をスキップしました"\)\).Count; $zero = \([regex]::Matches\($c, "0件|該当なし|投稿なし"\)\).Count; Write-Output "$d : summary-text合計=$summaries skip=$skip zeroマーカー=$zero サイズ=$\($c.Length\)" } })

PowerShell($credOut = "protocol=https`nhost=github.com`n" | git credential fill; $token = \($credOut | Where-Object { $_ -match '^password=' }\) -replace '^password=',''; if \(-not $token\) { Write-Output "NO TOKEN"; exit 1 }; $h = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; Accept = "application/vnd.github+json" }; $runs = Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $h -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/gamaken216/XwatchSystem/actions/workflows/monitor.yml/runs?per_page=3"; $runs.workflow_runs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.id\) $\($_.created_at\) $\($_.event\) $\($_.status\) $\($_.conclusion\)" })

PowerShell($credOut = @\("protocol=https","host=github.com",""\) | git credential fill; $token = \($credOut | Where-Object { $_ -match '^password=' }\) -replace '^password=',''; if \(-not $token\) { Write-Output "NO TOKEN"; exit 1 }; $h = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; Accept = "application/vnd.github+json" }; $runs = Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $h -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/gamaken216/XwatchSystem/actions/workflows/monitor.yml/runs?per_page=3"; $runs.workflow_runs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.id\) $\($_.created_at\) $\($_.event\) $\($_.status\) $\($_.conclusion\)" })

PowerShell($f = "$env:TEMP\\cred_in.txt"; [IO.File]::WriteAllText\($f, "protocol=https`nhost=github.com`n`n"\); $credOut = cmd /c "git credential fill < `"$f`"" ; $token = \($credOut | Where-Object { $_ -match '^password=' }\) -replace '^password=',''; $h = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; Accept = "application/vnd.github+json" }; $arts = Invoke-RestMethod -Headers $h -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/gamaken216/XwatchSystem/actions/runs/27312821230/artifacts"; $arts.artifacts | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.id\) $\($_.name\) $\($_.size_in_bytes\) bytes" }; if \($arts.artifacts.Count -gt 0\) { $aid = $arts.artifacts[0].id; $zip = "$env:TEMP\\xwatch_art_$aid.zip"; Invoke-WebRequest -Headers $h -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/gamaken216/XwatchSystem/actions/artifacts/$aid/zip" -OutFile $zip; $dir = "$env:TEMP\\xwatch_art_$aid"; Expand-Archive $zip -DestinationPath $dir -Force; Get-ChildItem $dir -Recurse -File | Select-Object FullName, Length })
Bash(git commit -m 'Geminiモデルを2.5-flash-liteへ変更: 2.0系の無料枠廃止\(limit:0\)で分析が全スキップしていた *)
